title: Neo Tools
description: Neo Tools is a modpack that contains a lot of optimization mods, useful tools and graphic mods.
body:
# 🛠️ Description

Neo Tools is a modpack that contains a lot of optimization mods, useful tools, and graphic mods.

## ⚠️ System Warning

This modpack is a huge one and is recommended for medium and high systems.

# 📜 Main List

Every mod has a small description. You can disable mods you don't need, but **don't touch libraries and Sodium**.

1. **Continuity** – A mod for connected textures.
2. **Plasmo Voice** – A proximity voice chat mod with audio positioning and lots of features.
3. **Xaero's Minimap** – Displays a map of the nearby world terrain, players, mobs, entities in the corner of your screen. Lets you create waypoints which help you find the locations you've marked.
4. **Litematica Printer** – This fork adds the missing printing functionality for Litematica.
5. **Euphoria Patches** – Add-on for Complementary Shaders with many features and customization.
6. **\[EMF] Entity Model Features** – Adds support for OptiFine's Custom Entity Models (CEM).
7. **Flashback** – Record your Minecraft gameplay, play it back and create stunning cinematic shots.
8. **ImmediatelyFast** – Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft.
9. **Capes** – Provides you with capes! You can choose from various providers or add your own.
10. **More Chat History** – Increases the maximum length of the chat history from the vanilla 100 messages to 16,384.
11. **BetterF3** – Replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD.
12. **Immersive UI** – Enhance your gameplay experience with animated UI components.
13. **Sodium** – Highly efficient mod for graphics and performance optimization.
14. **Particular ✨** – Enhances Minecraft's ambience with hand-crafted visual effects like fireflies, falling leaves, and waterfall cascades.
15. **\[ETF] Entity Texture Features** – Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resource packs, similar to OptiFine but for Fabric.
16. **Reese's Sodium Options** – Additional settings for the Sodium mod.
17. **Ambience V2** – Improvement of sound atmosphere and environment.
18. **Smooth Scrolling** – Smooth interface scrolling.
19. **Chat Animation \[Smooth Chat]** – Animated chat with smooth effects.
20. **AppleSkin** – Displays food and saturation information.
21. **Custom Scoreboard** – Customization of scoreboards in the game.
22. **Dynamic FPS** – FPS optimization when the game window is inactive.
23. **Bobby** – Mod for increasing render distance and chunk caching.
24. **Not Enough Animations** – Adds new player movement animations.
25. **Axiom** – Extended creative mode with multiple tools.
26. **Blur+** – Background blur effect in interfaces.
27. **Entity Culling** – Performance optimization by disabling rendering of invisible entities.
28. **Xaero's World Map** – Adds a self-writing fullscreen map to your Minecraft client. Works as a separate mod but is better with Xaero's Minimap.
29. **Vectorientation** – Visual improvements for directions and vectors.
30. **Explosive Enhancement** – Advanced explosion settings.
31. **Black Bar Concealer** – Hides black bars on the screen.
32. **Fabric API** – Core library for Fabric mods.
33. **Sodium Extra** – A Sodium addon that adds features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
34. **Debugify** – Fixes bugs and game shortcomings.
35. **Complementary Shaders** – High-quality shaders with realistic graphics.
36. **ItemSwapper** – Quick item replacement in inventory.
37. **Chat Heads** – Displays player avatars in chat.
38. **Falling Leaves** – Falling leaves animation for more realistic nature.
39. **Iris Shaders** – Shader loader and manager.
40. **Ok Zoomer** – Advanced zoom with smooth effects.
41. **Litematica** – Tool for creating and copying building schemas.
42. **Inventive Inventory** – Innovative inventory design.
43. **Item Highlighter** – Highlights specific items in inventory.
44. **Text Placeholder API** – API for working with text placeholders.
45. **ClickThrough Plus** – Improved interface interaction.
46. **Krypton** – Network code and performance optimization.
47. **Lithium** – Mod for optimizing game logic.
48. **Architectury API** – Universal API for cross-platform mods.
49. **Mod Menu** – Mod management menu.
50. **Durability Plus** – Extended item durability information.
51. **Chest Tracker** – Tracks chest contents.
52. **KeybindsGalore Plus** – Extended hotkey settings.
53. **Particle Rain** – Improved rain effects.
54. **Dynamic Brightness** – Dynamic brightness settings.
55. **Sound Physics Remastered** – Realistic sound physics.
56. **ViaFabricPlus** – Multi-version support.
57. **Eating Animation** – Improved food consumption animations.
58. **Held Item Info** – Additional information about items in hand.
59. **Language Reload** – Language pack reloading.
60. **FerriteCore** – Memory usage optimization.
61. **LambDynamicLights** – Dynamic lighting.
62. **Smooth Swapping** – Smooth item replacement.
63. **JJCalculator** – In-game calculator.
64. **Anti Ghost** – Prevents accidental actions.
65. **Custom HUD** – Just instrument to create custom hud.

##  📚Libraries

* **YetAnotherConfigLib (YACL)**
* **Iceberg**
* **Cloth Config API**
* **ObsidianUI**
* **MaLiLib**
* **Fabric Language Kotlin**
* **OctoLib**
* **M.R.U**
* **iChunUtil**
* **owo-lib**
* **Dark Loading Screen**
* **Forge Config API Port**
